mapper.insert: INSERT INTO analysis_tasks (task_id, stock_code, stock_codes, task_type, status, progress, message, result, error_message, skills, analysis_phase, report_language, created_at, started_at, completed_at) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{stockCode}, #{stockCodes}, #{taskType}, #{status}, #{progress}, #{message}, #{result}, #{errorMessage}, #{skills}, #{analysisPhase}, #{reportLanguage}, #{createdAt}, #{startedAt}, #{completedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE analysis_tasks SET stock_code=#{stockCode}, stock_codes=#{stockCodes}, task_type=#{taskType}, status=#{status}, progress=#{progress}, message=#{message}, result=#{result}, error_message=#{errorMessage}, skills=#{skills}, analysis_phase=#{analysisPhase}, report_language=#{reportLanguage}, started_at=#{startedAt}, completed_at=#{completedAt} WHERE task_id=#{taskId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM analysis_tasks WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM analysis_tasks ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE analysis_tasks SET status=#{status}, progress=#{progress}, message=#{message} WHERE task_id=#{taskId}
UPDATE analysis_tasks SET status=#{status}, progress=#{progress}, result=#{result}, error_message=#{errorMessage}, completed_at=#{completedAt} WHERE task_id=#{taskId}
